notes: Initial flagship multimodal model announced by Google DeepMind; high-end reasoning and multimodal capabilities.
General-purpose Gemini model; deployed via Bard web interface and API integration.
Optimized for mobile/on-device use; deployed on Pixel 8 and Android ecosystem.
Major context expansion (1M token context in preview); early multimodal reasoning improvements.
Lightweight, faster variant emphasizing lower latency and efficiency.
Announced as part of Google’s 'Gemini Advanced' upgrade; replaced Bard branding in public interface.
Optimized for speed and API cost-efficiency; integrated into Vertex AI.
Ultra-fast minimal model for lightweight use cases (mobile, low-power).
Improved reasoning and 'thinking' capabilities; GA release in Vertex AI.
Fast and efficient model; publicly available through Vertex AI API.
Fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini model; targeted at Android and Edge deployments.
